input-field.name: contactTag
input-field.label: Contact Tag
Kontakt-Tag
input-field.helpText: Tag assigned to the contact in Freshdesk. Default is Webshop.
Tag, das dem Kontakt in Freshdesk zugewiesen wird. Standard ist Webshop.

input-field.name: enableRegistrationSyncCheckbox
input-field.label: Show marketing consent checkbox on registration
Marketing-Einwilligungs-Checkbox bei der Registrierung anzeigen
input-field.helpText: When enabled, customers can explicitly opt in to marketing communication during registration.
Wenn aktiviert, koennen Kunden waehrend der Registrierung ausdruecklich in Marketingkommunikation einwilligen.

input-field.name: registrationSyncCheckboxLabel
input-field.label: Marketing consent
Marketing-Einwilligung
input-field.helpText: Optional custom label shown next to the marketing consent checkbox. Leave empty to use the storefront snippet.
Optionales eigenes Label neben der Marketing-Einwilligungs-Checkbox. Leer lassen, um das Storefront-Snippet zu verwenden.
input-field.placeholder: I’d like to receive occasional updates, offers, and news from by email
